title: oestlundorchis obtecta
side_effects: Oestlundorchis obtecta can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as allergic reactions like hives and itching. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can lead to more serious health issues, such as kidney or liver damage. There have also been reports of Oestlundorchis obtecta causing cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using Oestlundorchis obtecta or any other herbal remedy to avoid potential side effects.
